# Rate Hero

> Rate Hero is a licensed mortgage company (NMLS #2822806) specializing in DSCR loans, Non-QM mortgages, bank statement loans, and hard money exit refinances for real estate investors and self-employed borrowers. Available in 30+ states.

## About

Rate Hero, Inc. is a non-QM mortgage lender focused on real estate investors and self-employed borrowers. The company offers DSCR loans, bank statement loans, P&L loans, asset utilization loans, WVOE loans, investment property HELOCs, and hard money exit refinances. No W-2 or tax returns required for most programs. Typical close time is 21 days. Founder: Sean Davoodian (NMLS #1252107).

- Website: https://goratehero.com
- Company NMLS: 2822806
- Loan officer: Sean Davoodian, NMLS #1252107

## Loan Programs

- [DSCR loans](https://goratehero.com/dscr-loans/): Qualify investment property loans on rental income, not personal income.
- [Non-QM loans](https://goratehero.com/non-qm/): Alternative documentation mortgages for borrowers who don't fit conventional guidelines.
- [Bank statement loans](https://goratehero.com/non-qm/bank-statement-loans/): Self-employed mortgages using 12 or 24 months of bank deposits.
- [Hard money exit refinance](https://goratehero.com/brrrr/): Refinance hard money or bridge debt into long-term DSCR financing.
- [Investment property HELOC](https://goratehero.com/heloc/): Second-lien HELOCs on rental properties and LLC-vested homes.
- [Long-term rental DSCR](https://goratehero.com/dscr-loans/): 30-year financing for stabilized rental properties.
- [Short-term rental DSCR](https://goratehero.com/str-dscr-loans-florida-airbnb.html): DSCR loans qualified on Airbnb / short-term rental income.
- [BRRRR loans](https://goratehero.com/brrrr/): Financing for the buy-rehab-rent-refinance-repeat strategy.
- [Conventional loans](https://goratehero.com/conventional/): Conforming agency mortgages.
